title: begonia verruculosa
intro: Begonia verruculosa, also known as the rough-leaved begonia, is a species of plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Begonia verruculosa include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections. The herbal preparations of Begonia verruculosa include infusions and decoctions made from the leaves and roots, which can be used to treat various ailments.
